---
name: Feature request
about: Plan a prototype feature or flow change
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should Retake be able to do?

## Flow

Where does this live?

- [ ] Inviter/editor
- [ ] Invitee rebuild
- [ ] Landing/marketing
- [ ] Backend/API
- [ ] Docs/tooling

## Desired Behavior

Describe the expected interaction, screen, or state change.

## Design Notes

Reference `docs/design-system.md` for UI changes.

## Acceptance Checks

- [ ] Works on mobile viewport
- [ ] Works on desktop viewport if relevant
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
